hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl tracking-tight font-heading font-semibold text-white
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl tracking-tight font-heading font-medium text-white
hierarchy.overline: text-[10px] sm:text-xs font-heading font-semibold tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-zinc-500

rules: Avoid standard bold (700) for large headings; prefer medium (500) or semibold (600) with tight tracking.
Remove uppercase from large headings (heading-xl, heading-lg, heading-md) to make it look more premium. Use uppercase strictly for overlines, labels, and table headers.
Use Plus Jakarta Sans for tabular data as it has excellent numeral legibility.

spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: Use Mode B: Control Room Grid for the dashboard. Base grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6). Ensure all cards stretch to h-full.
spacing_and_layout.padding: Use generous padding inside containers. Cards must have p-6 or p-8.
spacing_and_layout.sidebar: Refine the left sidebar to use a deep obsidian background, border-r border-white/5, and soft active states (bg-white/5) instead of harsh colors.
spacing_and_layout.table_layout: Keep tables dense but readable. Use optical alignment: left-align headers, center-align badges, right-align monetary values/actions.

components.card-obsidian: Update class to: bg-[#0E0E11] border border-white/5 rounded-xl shadow-2xl shadow-black/50 overflow-hidden relative
components.card-obsidian-interactive: Add to base card: transition-all duration-300 cursor-pointer hover:border-sony-red/30 hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_-10px_rgba(230,0,18,0.2)] hover:-translate-y-1
components.btn-sony: Update class to: bg-sony-red text-white font-body font-semibold px-6 py-2.5 rounded-md transition-all duration-300 hover:bg-sony-red-hover hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_-5px_rgba(230,0,18,0.4)] active:scale-[0.98] flex items-center justify-center gap-2
components.btn-sony-outline: Update class to: bg-transparent text-white border border-white/15 font-body font-semibold px-6 py-2.5 rounded-md transition-all duration-300 hover:bg-white/5 hover:border-white/30 active:scale-[0.98]
components.glass-dark: Update class to: bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)]
components.table-header: Update class to: font-heading text-[10px] uppercase tracking-[0.15em] text-zinc-500 bg-[#16161A] py-3

badges.success: bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-400 border border-emerald-500/20 font-body text-xs font-medium px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full
badges.warning: bg-amber-500/10 text-amber-400 border border-amber-500/20 font-body text-xs font-medium px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full
badges.info: bg-blue-500/10 text-blue-400 border border-blue-500/20 font-body text-xs font-medium px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full
badges.error: bg-red-500/10 text-red-400 border border-red-500/20 font-body text-xs font-medium px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full

glow-effects.sony-glow-top: background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(230,0,18,0.12) 0%, transparent 100%); border-top: 1px solid rgba(230,0,18,0.4);

motion_and_interactions.animations: Use Framer Motion for page transitions and staggering lists. Use pure CSS for button/hover states.
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Fade in with a slight upward slide: initial={{opacity: 0, y: 10}}, animate={{opacity: 1, y: 0}}, transition={{duration: 0.4, ease: 'easeOut'}}
motion_and_interactions.stagger_children: For dashboard KPI cards and table rows, use staggerChildren: 0.05

image_urls.instructions: Use this as the hero background for the Login page. Overlay it with a bg-black/60 to bg-black/80 gradient so the login card is perfectly legible.
Use this as the logged-in user avatar in the top header and within the Acesso (user management) table.
Use this as secondary avatar placeholders in the Acesso user management table.

attributes: All buttons, navigation links, and actionable icons must include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case based on their role.

instructions_to_main_agent: Refactor frontend/src/index.css to replace Barlow Condensed and Manrope with Outfit and Plus Jakarta Sans. Ensure the @import url is updated.

Update frontend/tailwind.config.js to map 'heading' to Outfit and 'body' to Plus Jakarta Sans. Ensure to retain existing custom colors (e.g., sony-red) while refining the HSL variables in index.css as provided.
Redesign the Dashboard layout using the 'Control Room Grid' approach. Make sure charts use the new fonts in their tooltips (.recharts-tooltip-label).
Replace all heavy standard borders in the UI with subtle border-white/5 or border-white/10.
Ensure the entire app remains in Portuguese.
In the Login page, use the provided dark abstract texture as the background image with a deep black vignette/overlay.

For typography in index.css, remove 'uppercase' from the .heading-xl, .heading-lg, .heading-md classes to make it feel more modern and premium. Keep uppercase ONLY on .overline, .table-header, and small buttons.
